TestHero: posts small blind 10
Villain1: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***

TestHero: raises 50 to 60
Villain1: raises 140 to 200
TestHero: calls 140
*** FLOP *** [2c 7d Ts]
TestHero: checks
Villain1: checks
*** TURN *** [2c 7d Ts] [5h]
TestHero: checks
Villain1: checks
*** RIVER *** [2c 7d Ts 5h] [8s]
TestHero: checks
Villain1: checks
*** SHOW DOWN ***
TestHero: shows [Ah Kd] (high card Ace)
Villain1: shows [Qd Js] (high card Queen)
TestHero collected 400 from pot

Total pot 400 | Rake 0
